roa.docketEntryComment: DEFTS ADD TO CALENDAR TO CORRECT BAIL FILED

/AJW/CH1:SP 4Y:L/667(D)(E)/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 556 DAYSCOUNTY JAIL, 556 SAGE FOR ATOTAL OF 1,112 DAYS/DNACOMP/CCC:15017488 AND 15017939/VF5:300/COA:40/ICNA/PAR/CDC/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/

/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/ /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:001/IBARRA/FNDG/X:DEFENDANT ADMITS ALLEGATION OF PRIOR PC 459 STRIKE CONVICTION AS TRUE,/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/REMA/SA2:535 TAYLOR ST,, S,F,, CA/SA2:2200 SACRAMENTO ST,, S,F,, CA/SAORD/PRES:12-21-16/TWS/CONTD:PSR AND SENTENCE/DOP/ARBUCKLE/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INVOFF:SGT ROSEMARIE SMITH/WIT SWORN:OSCAR MONTEMAYOR    /EXHMA:DEFENSE A, DOCUMENT WITH STILL VIDEO PHOTOGRAPHS - BURGLARYSUSPECTS, ID NEEDED; DEFENSE B-H, STILL VIDEO PHOTOGRAPHS    /WIT SWORN:OFFICER ROSELO PASCUA/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1, DOCUMENT WITH 4 PHOTOGRAPHS/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/HTA1:1/X:THE MAGISTRATE FINDS THAT THE OFFENSE OF PC 459, FIRST DEGREE FELONY SHOWN BY THE EVIDENCE, HAS BEEN COMMITTED; THAT THERE IS SUFFICIENT CAUSE TO BELIEVE THE ABOVE NAMED DEFENDANT GUILTY THEREOF, IT IS ORDERED THATSAID DEFENDANT BE HELD TO ANSWERTO THE SAME,/TWA/DEF:WAIVES TIME FOR FILING OF INFORMATION AND OF FILING OF TRANSCRIPT/BAIL:100000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIM HRG/X:DEFENSE IS NOT ABLE TO PROCEED WITH THE PRELIMINARY HEARING TODAY, THERE IS A VIDEO THAT HE NEEDS TO REVIEW TO BE PREPARED/X:THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE THE HEARING/LDPX:10-13-15/CONTD PRELIM HRG,DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/NTW60/LDPX:10-13-15/X:COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO VACATE TODAY'S PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:JOHN KAMAN       /TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:08-28-15/BAIL:200000     /CONTD:TO JOIN 15017488/CONTD:FORPRELIMINARY HEARING/
/CAL:TRLG 15017488/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:CASESETTLED IN DEPT 23TODAY/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: CASE HEARD IN D22 TODAY/
/CAL:TO SET JURY TRIAL/DAWT/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOPC/CONTD:TO SETJURY TRIAL/DOP/
/X: HEARING DATE OF 02-09-16, DEPT 22 IS CONFIRMED,/
/CAL:TO SET JURY TRIAL & JOIN #15017488/CONTD:PRE-TRIAL AND TO SET JURY TRIAL/DOP/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: 12-16-15 IN DEPT, 22 IS CONFIRMED/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/CON:JOHN KAMAN/FAW/DEFTARR/GTW/ /CONTD: PRETRIAL IN DEPT 23 AND TO SET JURY TRIAL/DOP/
